en: Hi there, can I come in? No. Nice room. Here, have a drink.
ko: 안녕, 들어가도 돼? 안 돼. 좋은 방이네. 한 잔 해.

en: So, that's a great piece of real estate you've got there. A mighty fine piece of ass. What?
ko: 거기 좋은 부동산이네. 훌륭한 여자야. 뭐?

en: Big Suze? In business, Jeremy, you learn that every man has his price, and I charge yours to be £530.
ko: 빅 수즈? 비즈니스에서는 모든 사람에게 가격이 있어, 네 가격은 530파운드야.

en: What? I'm not going to beat around the bush, Jeremy. I want to make you a real-life indecent proposal.
ko: 뭐? 돌려 말하지 않을게, 제러미. 진짜 부도덕한 제안을 하려고.

en: An indecent proposal? I want to sleep with your girlfriend, Jeremy, but I don't like playing the game with women, I don't like listening to them, I don't like talking to them, but I do like some of the things they do.
ko: 부도덕한 제안? 네 여자친구와 자고 싶어. 여자들과 게임하는 거 싫고, 듣는 것도 싫고, 대화하는 것도 싫지만 그들이 하는 건 좋아.

en: So? £530 to sleep with Big Suze? That's my indecent proposal.
ko: 그래서? 빅 수즈와 자는 데 530파운드? 그게 내 부도덕한 제안이야.

en: It certainly is an indecent proposal. You have a property of which I wish to make a use. Is that so very different from hiring a solicitor or leasing out a Spanish villa?
ko: 확실히 부도덕한 제안이네. 내 부동산을 이용하고 싶은 거잖아. 변호사 고용하거나 스페인 별장 임대하는 것과 뭐가 다르지?

en: Well, it is a bit different, because you'd be putting your dick right... What's your answer, Jeremy? Maybe you could finger her for £300?
ko: 좀 다르지, 네 자... 답이 뭐야? 300파운드에 만져보는 건?

en: I'm not going to bargain with you, Jeremy. He obviously thinks I'm some sort of skag-addict bedroom DJ who can be bought off, but no-one's going to give me a medal for saying no.
ko: 흥정은 안 해, 제러미. 분명 나를 매수할 수 있는 마약 중독 DJ로 생각하겠지만, 거절한다고 상 주는 사람은 없고.

en: I am pretty broken. OK, it's a deal. Is this a terrible idea? It can't be.
ko: 나도 상황이 안 좋긴 해. 좋아, 거래야. 이게 끔찍한 생각일까? 아닐 거야.

en: It's in a film. They wouldn't put a terrible idea in a film. They'd get sued. Shit.
ko: 영화에 나온 거니까. 영화에 끔찍한 아이디어를 넣었다간 고소당하잖아. 젠장.

en: This could be a tricky sell. Say, Suze, do you like the films of Robert Redford?
ko: 이건 설득이 쉽지 않겠네. 수즈, 로버트 레드포드 영화 좋아해?

en: I don't know. Who is he? He's a red-haired old gentleman and he started the Sundance Film Festival.
ko: 모르겠어. 누구야? 빨간 머리 노신사고 선댄스 영화제를 시작한 분이야.

en: Sounds like a nice man. Exactly. So, in that spirit, I was wondering, basically, how would you feel about sleeping with Mark's boss for money?
ko: 좋은 사람 같네. 바로 그런 마음으로, 마크 상사랑 돈 받고 자는 거 어떻게 생각해?

en: Sleep with a man? For money? Yeah, but it's not like that. It's from a Hollywood film.
ko: 남자랑? 돈 받고? 그런 게 아니야. 할리우드 영화에 나온 거라고.

en: Sounds like you want to pimp me out. Pimp me out, pimp my ride. There's a new climate. I'm a human being, Jeremy.
ko: 나를 팔아먹으려는 거 같은데. 나는 인간이야, 제러미.

en: Yeah, sure, from one perspective, but also, is it really so different from hiring a solicitor or leasing a villa in Spain?
ko: 한 관점에서 보면 그렇지만, 변호사 고용이나 스페인 별장 임대와 뭐가 다르지?

en: I can't believe this, Jeremy. This is really horrible. No, look, Suze, no, sorry. I love you, I love you.
ko: 믿을 수 없어, 제러미. 정말 끔찍해. 아니, 수즈, 미안. 사랑해.

en: I've just got this big overdraft. I take it all back. There. Normal. We're back to normal.
ko: 마이너스 통장이 커서. 다 취소할게. 원래대로야.

en: No, we're not. You tried to make me a hooker. It was a joke, Suze. I'm hitting the reset button. Goodbye, Jeremy. Don't go!
ko: 아니, 아니야. 나를 창녀로 만들려고 했잖아. 농담이야, 수즈. 리셋 버튼 누를게. 안녕, 제러미. 가지 마!

en: God, I only asked her to be a hooker. It's not like I wanted her to work in telesales. Here we go, big Suze's place.
ko: 세상에, 창녀 해달라고 했을 뿐인데. 텔레마케팅 하라는 것도 아니었잖아. 빅 수즈 집이다.

en: If she won't take my calls, how about I hit her with some petrol station flowers? Johnson?
ko: 전화를 안 받으니, 주유소 꽃이라도 들이밀어볼까? 존슨?

en: Jeremy. What the hell are you...? Suze came round to the office to give me a piece of her mind and ended up giving me a piece of her ass.
ko: 제러미. 여기서 뭘... 수즈가 회사에 따지러 왔다가 결국 나랑 사귀게 됐어.

en: Suze, what's he doing here? We're in a relationship, Jez. What do you mean? It's fun. We eat breakfast off each other.
ko: 수즈, 여기서 뭐 하는 거야? 우리 사귀는 거야. 재밌잖아. 서로 몸에 아침 식사를 올려놓고 먹어.

en: Come on, Annie, let's get moving. It's two hours to Kettering, even in a top-of-the-range Beamer. He didn't even pay for her.
ko: 자, 애니, 가자. 케터링까지 2시간이야, 최고급 BMW로도. 돈도 안 내고 데려갔어.

en: He's an alpha male, Jeremy, and you'd be the first to admit you're a bottom feeder. No, I wouldn't.
ko: 그는 알파 메일이야, 제러미. 네가 밑바닥이라는 건 네가 먼저 인정할 거잖아. 안 하거든.

en: You can't treat me like this, Johnson. You owe me. I'll take this to the Citizens Advice Bureau. How do you like those guys on your ass?
ko: 이렇게 대할 순 없어, 존슨. 빚이 있잖아. 시민상담소에 고발할 거야.

en: Don't give up, Alan! Hey, Suze.
ko: 포기하지 마, 앨런! 수즈.

en: Jeremy, what the hell are you doing here? Me? Nothing. I was just passing through Kettering and I thought, hey, I know someone who's gone to Kettering for the weekend.
ko: 제러미, 여기서 뭐 해? 나? 아무것도. 그냥 케터링을 지나가다 누가 주말에 케터링 갔다고 해서.

en: Jez. Honestly, I was always coming to Kettering. I like it here. It's a party town. Look, come on, Suze.
ko: 솔직히, 원래 케터링에 오려던 거야. 여기 좋아. 파티 도시잖아. 자, 수즈.

en: I mean, let's sort this. What do you see in Johnson? I just like him. Come on. Is it because he's black?
ko: 이거 정리하자. 존슨의 뭐가 좋은 거야? 그냥 좋아. 아니 그래서. 흑인이라서 그래?

en: What? No! I hadn't even noticed. Well, you're making a mistake, Suze, because he's terrible at being black.
ko: 뭐? 아니! 눈치도 못 챘어. 실수하고 있어, 수즈. 그는 흑인 역할을 못해.

en: I'm a better black man than he is. That sounds almost... Look, Suze, being black isn't about the colour of your skin.
ko: 나는 그보다 더 나은 흑인이야. 그건 좀... 흑인이라는 건 피부색이 아니야.

en: It's about vibe, about hanging out, kicking back, smoking a number, fighting prejudice and negative stereotypes, wherever you find them.
ko: 분위기야. 놀고, 쉬고, 담배 피우고, 편견과 부정적 고정관념에 맞서 싸우는 거야.

en: Yeah? I'm down with all that. Is Johnson... I mean, what's Johnson done for black people lately? Well, you mean apart from his mentoring and his community work?
ko: 나도 다 공감해. 존슨은... 존슨이 흑인을 위해 뭘 했는데? 멘토링이나 지역 봉사 활동 말고?

en: Yeah, apart from that. Jeremy, you tried to sell my body to another man for private gain.
ko: 그거 말고. 제러미, 넌 내 몸을 돈 받고 다른 남자에게 팔려고 했어.

en: I don't want to talk to you. Goodbye. I did not try to sell her body to another man.
ko: 대화하기 싫어. 안녕. 나는 그녀의 몸을 팔려고 한 게 아니야.

en: I tried to rent out her sexual organs on a one-use basis. Jeremy?
ko: 성적 기관을 일회용으로 빌려주려고 한 거야. 제러미?

en: Where's Mark? And what the hell are you doing here? I know my rights. I've spoken to my friends at the Citizens Advice Bureau.
ko: 마크는 어디고 여기서 뭐 하는 거야? 내 권리를 알아. 시민상담소 친구들과 얘기했어.

en: Pay up, or I shall make a disturbance. OK, sure, fine, if it'll make you feel any better.
ko: 돈 내, 안 그러면 소란 피울 거야. 좋아, 기분이 나아진다면.

en: Here. £380. Cash. Will that do?
ko: 여기. 380파운드. 현금. 되겠어?

en: I'll take it. And you know what? This means nothing to me. I haven't got a penny in the world, Suze, but this means nothing to me without you.
ko: 받을게. 근데 있지? 이건 나한테 아무 의미 없어. 한 푼도 없지만 너 없이는 의미가 없어.

en: There, you see? Now do you see? That's how I feel. Now will you go back out with me?
ko: 봤지? 이제 알겠어? 이게 내 마음이야. 다시 사귈래?

en: Er, no, Jez. I'm just not really that into you.
ko: 음, 아니, 제즈. 그냥 별로야.

en: In that case, if you'll excuse me.
ko: 그렇다면, 실례할게.

en: DOOR OPENS AND CLOSES Shit, this could be difficult to row back from.
ko: (문 열리고 닫히는 소리) 젠장, 여기서 빠져나오기 어렵겠네.

en: This isn't a misspelt email, this is going feral. I mean, rejecting society and seeking the company of wild creatures, that's not going to look good on my quarterly review.
ko: 젠장, 여기서 빠져나오기 어렵겠네.
